testcases.name: Orb visible at center
testcases.expected: Orb element .orb-equalizer exists and centered in viewport

testcases.name: Rings spinning different directions
testcases.expected: 4 rings with different animation keyframes and speeds

testcases.name: Orb turns orange when speaking
testcases.expected: Orb has class .active, rings have orange border-color

testcases.name: Bubble centered below orb
testcases.expected: Bubble center X matches viewport center X (offset < 10px)

testcases.name: Send message in chat
testcases.expected: User message appears, AI response appears after

testcases.name: Chat does NOT trigger speech
testcases.expected: isAiSpeaking remains false, no audio plays

testcases.name: Voice button activates mic
testcases.expected: Clicking voice button sets listening=true, subtitle shows Mendengarkan

testcases.name: Chat search shows inline (mobile)
testcases.expected: Search results appear as chat message text

testcases.name: Voice search always opens viewer
testcases.expected: Viewer opens regardless of viewport size

testcases.name: Specific video auto-plays
testcases.expected: Viewer opens with video URL embedded

testcases.name: Timer set and fires
testcases.expected: After 1s, speakLine called with timer message

testcases.name: Weather fetch works
testcases.expected: Response contains temperature number and city name

testcases.name: Date response
testcases.expected: Response contains day name and date

testcases.name: Memory retains context
testcases.expected: AI references previous topic when asked lanjutkan

testcases.name: Time-based greeting
testcases.expected: Greeting contains Selamat pagi/siang/sore/malam based on hour
